entry.title: Employment Rights Act 2025 effect on Data Protection Act 2018
Employment Rights Act 2025 effect on Data Protection Act 2018

ukm:InForce.Comments: except to the extent that it refers to Article 8A(3)(e) in the insertion of section 9A (processing in reliance on relevant international law) in the Data Protection Act 2018

ukm:InForce.Qualification: in force in so far as not already in force
